2026-04-14T03:53:58.6698422Z [hash-debug] Frontmatter text (6521 chars):
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6699075Z ---
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6699458Z description: |
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6700070Z   Intelligent issue triage assistant that processes new issues
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6701115Z   Analyzes issue content, evaluates whether the author is a customer,
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6702110Z   predicts labels, looks up owners from CODEOWNERS, and provides
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6703445Z   analysis notes including debugging strategies and resource links
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6704483Z   Implements the initial issue triage rules for the Azure SDK repository
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6705149Z 
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6705303Z on:
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6705672Z   issues:
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6706039Z     types: [opened]
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6706461Z   workflow_dispatch:
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6706885Z     inputs:
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6707260Z       issue_number:
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6708033Z         description: "Issue number to triage (used when dispatched from another workflow)"
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6708985Z         required: true
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6709427Z         type: string
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6709862Z   roles: all
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6710266Z   reaction: eyes
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6710519Z 
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6710699Z permissions: read-all
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6710984Z 
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6711155Z network:
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6711517Z   allowed:
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6711887Z     - defaults
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6712283Z     - "api.nuget.org"
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6712566Z 
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6712752Z safe-outputs:
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6735961Z   report-failure-as-issue: false
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6736643Z   add-labels:
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6737038Z     max: 7
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6737401Z     target: "*"
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6737808Z   remove-labels:
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6738198Z     max: 7
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6738577Z     target: "*"
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6741201Z   add-comment:
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6742451Z     max: 2
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6742899Z     target: "*"
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6743882Z   assign-to-user:
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6744324Z     max: 1
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6745061Z     target: "*"
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6750381Z   close-issue:
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6750825Z     max: 1
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6751210Z     target: "*"
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6751601Z   noop:
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6848110Z     report-as-issue: false
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6852204Z   jobs:
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6891110Z     mention_owners:
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6892479Z       description: "Post a routing comment @mentioning team owners on the triggering issue; bypasses safe-outputs mention neutralization"
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6910236Z       runs-on: ubuntu-latest
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6910863Z       output: "Owner mention comment posted"
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6911495Z       permissions:
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6911969Z         issues: write
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6912412Z       inputs:
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6912806Z         message:
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6913740Z           description: "The comment body text without any @mentions or @ symbols"
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6915454Z           required: true
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6915922Z           type: string
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6916345Z         owners:
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6917450Z           description: "Comma-separated GitHub usernames to notify, without the @ prefix (e.g. 'user1, user2, Azure/team-name')"
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6919109Z           required: true
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6919587Z           type: string
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6920020Z       steps:
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6922394Z         - name: Post mention comment
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6923395Z           uses: actions/github-script@v9
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6923981Z           env:
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6924664Z             DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER: "${{ github.event.inputs.issue_number || '' }}"
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6925517Z           with:
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6925928Z             script: |
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6926375Z               const fs = require('fs');
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6927078Z               const outputFile = process.env.GH_AW_AGENT_OUTPUT;
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6927735Z 
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6928162Z               function resolveIssueNumber() {
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6929467Z                 if (Number.isInteger(context.issue?.number) && context.issue.number > 0) {
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6930436Z                   return context.issue.number;
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6931042Z                 }
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6931773Z                 const parsed = parseInt(process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER, 10);
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6932684Z                 if (Number.isInteger(parsed) && parsed > 0) {
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6991152Z                   return parsed;
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6991866Z                 }
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6992343Z                 return null;
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6992822Z               }
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6993361Z 
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6993637Z               const issueNumber = resolveIssueNumber();
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6994747Z               const owner = context.repo.owner;
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6995447Z               const repo = context.repo.repo;
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6995891Z 
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6996094Z               if (issueNumber === null) {
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6997973Z                 core.setFailed(`Unable to determine a valid issue number. context.issue.number=${context.issue?.number ?? 'undefined'}, DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER=${process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER ?? 'undefined'}`);
2026-04-14T03:53:58.6999796Z                 return;
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7000227Z               }
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7000470Z 
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7000681Z               async function failSafe(reason) {
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7001406Z                 core.error(`mention_owners failed: ${reason}`);
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7002064Z                 try {
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7002566Z                   await github.rest.issues.addLabels({
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7023737Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7024482Z                     labels: ['needs-team-triage']
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7025093Z                   });
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7025632Z                   await github.rest.issues.createComment({
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7026363Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7027906Z                     body: '⚠️ Automated triage was unable to complete owner notification for this issue. Routing for manual triage'
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7029111Z                   });
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7029574Z                 } catch (recoveryError) {
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7030345Z                   core.error(`Recovery also failed: ${recoveryError.message}`);
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7031106Z                 }
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7031529Z                 core.setFailed(reason);
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7032075Z               }
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7032307Z 
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7032494Z               if (!outputFile) {
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7054226Z                 await failSafe('No agent output path provided');
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7055015Z                 return;
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7055480Z               }
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7055944Z               if (!fs.existsSync(outputFile)) {
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7056756Z                 await failSafe(`Agent output file not found: ${outputFile}`);
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7057529Z                 return;
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7057954Z               }
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7058207Z 
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7058394Z               let agentOutput;
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7059102Z               try {
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7059764Z                 agentOutput = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(outputFile, 'utf8'));
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7060683Z               } catch (parseError) {
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7061502Z                 await failSafe(`Failed to parse agent output: ${parseError.message}`);
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7062393Z                 return;
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7062817Z               }
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7063765Z 
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7064112Z               if (!agentOutput || !Array.isArray(agentOutput.items)) {
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7065310Z                 await failSafe('Agent output missing items array');
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7066001Z                 return;
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7066440Z               }
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7066669Z 
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7067122Z               const items = agentOutput.items.filter(i => i.type === 'mention_owners');
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7068022Z               if (items.length === 0) {
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7068756Z                 await failSafe('No mention_owners items in agent output');
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7069487Z                 return;
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7069922Z               }
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7070153Z 
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7070349Z               for (const item of items) {
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7071189Z                 if (!item.owners || typeof item.owners !== 'string' || !item.owners.trim()) {
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7072232Z                   await failSafe('mention_owners item missing owners field');
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7073206Z                   return;
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7073690Z                 }
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7073941Z 
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7074158Z                 const mentions = item.owners
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7074783Z                   .split(/[\s,]+/)
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7075348Z                   .map(s => s.trim())
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7075900Z                   .filter(Boolean)
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7076419Z                   .map(raw => {
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7077041Z                     const normalized = raw.replace(/^\\?@/, '');
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7077782Z                     if (/\r|\n/.test(normalized)) return null;
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7078697Z                     if (!/^[A-Za-z0-9-]+(?:\/[A-Za-z0-9-]+)?$/.test(normalized)) return null;
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7079529Z                     return `@${normalized}`;
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7080145Z                   })
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7080586Z                   .filter(Boolean);
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7080945Z 
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7081150Z                 if (mentions.length === 0) {
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7081931Z                   await failSafe('No valid owners after parsing owners field');
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7082701Z                   return;
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7083377Z                 }
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7083642Z 
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7083860Z                 const body = item.message
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7084563Z                   ? `${item.message}\n\n//cc: ${mentions.join(' ')}`
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7085270Z                   : mentions.join(' ');
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7085671Z 
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7085839Z                 try {
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7086363Z                   await github.rest.issues.createComment({
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7087081Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7087716Z                     body
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7088150Z                   });
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7089014Z                   core.info(`Posted routing comment on #${issueNumber} mentioning: ${mentions.join(', ')}`);
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7090020Z                 } catch (apiError) {
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7090844Z                   await failSafe(`GitHub API error posting comment: ${apiError.message}`);
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7091725Z                   return;
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7092205Z                 }
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7092587Z               }
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7092829Z 
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7093159Z tools:
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7093533Z   web-fetch:
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7093921Z   github:
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7094296Z     toolsets: [issues]
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7095054Z     # Triage must read issues from all users, including external
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7095934Z     # customers with NONE author_association; without this, the
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7096894Z     # auto-applied "approved" policy filters them out via DIFC
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7097607Z     min-integrity: none
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7097894Z 
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7098072Z timeout-minutes: 10
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7098476Z ---

2026-04-14T03:53:58.7222064Z           required: true
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7223530Z           type: string

2026-04-14T03:53:58.7227934Z             DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER: "${{ github.event.inputs.issue_number || '' }}"
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7229117Z           with:
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7230013Z             script: |
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7231285Z               const fs = require('fs');
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7232359Z               const outputFile = process.env.GH_AW_AGENT_OUTPUT;
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7232899Z 
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7233323Z               function resolveIssueNumber() {
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7234214Z                 if (Number.isInteger(context.issue?.number) && context.issue.number > 0) {
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7235159Z                   return context.issue.number;
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7237320Z                 }
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7239026Z                 const parsed = parseInt(process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER, 10);
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7239966Z                 if (Number.isInteger(parsed) && parsed > 0) {
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7240639Z                   return parsed;
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7241138Z                 }
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7241649Z                 return null;
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7244435Z               }
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7245080Z 
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7245593Z               const issueNumber = resolveIssueNumber();
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7247075Z               const owner = context.repo.owner;
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7247732Z               const repo = context.repo.repo;
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7248172Z 
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7249020Z               if (issueNumber === null) {
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7250888Z                 core.setFailed(`Unable to determine a valid issue number. context.issue.number=${context.issue?.number ?? 'undefined'}, DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER=${process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER ?? 'undefined'}`);
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7252709Z                 return;
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7306891Z               }
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7307207Z 
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7307436Z               async function failSafe(reason) {
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7308176Z                 core.error(`mention_owners failed: ${reason}`);
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7309292Z                 try {
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7310059Z                   await github.rest.issues.addLabels({
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7328931Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7329997Z                     labels: ['needs-team-triage']
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7330624Z                   });
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7331154Z                   await github.rest.issues.createComment({
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7335071Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7341136Z                     body: '⚠️ Automated triage was unable to complete owner notification for this issue. Routing for manual triage'
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7345509Z                   });
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7346062Z                 } catch (recoveryError) {
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7346835Z                   core.error(`Recovery also failed: ${recoveryError.message}`);
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7347626Z                 }
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7348059Z                 core.setFailed(reason);
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7348601Z               }
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7348834Z 
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7349018Z               if (!outputFile) {
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7349664Z                 await failSafe('No agent output path provided');
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7352157Z                 return;
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7352638Z               }
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7353584Z               if (!fs.existsSync(outputFile)) {
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7354400Z                 await failSafe(`Agent output file not found: ${outputFile}`);
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7355157Z                 return;
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7355576Z               }
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7356639Z 
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7356836Z               let agentOutput;
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7358265Z               try {
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7359357Z                 agentOutput = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(outputFile, 'utf8'));
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7360834Z               } catch (parseError) {
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7362920Z                 await failSafe(`Failed to parse agent output: ${parseError.message}`);
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7387163Z                 return;
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7387629Z               }
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7387875Z 
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7388216Z               if (!agentOutput || !Array.isArray(agentOutput.items)) {
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7389073Z                 await failSafe('Agent output missing items array');
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7389780Z                 return;
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7390226Z               }
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7390458Z 
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7391024Z               const items = agentOutput.items.filter(i => i.type === 'mention_owners');
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7392654Z               if (items.length === 0) {
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7393602Z                 await failSafe('No mention_owners items in agent output');
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7394350Z                 return;
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7394785Z               }
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7395020Z 
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7395212Z               for (const item of items) {
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7396051Z                 if (!item.owners || typeof item.owners !== 'string' || !item.owners.trim()) {
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7397628Z                   await failSafe('mention_owners item missing owners field');
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7398958Z                   return;
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7399407Z                 }
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7399644Z 
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7399850Z                 const mentions = item.owners
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7400435Z                   .split(/[\s,]+/)
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7401013Z                   .map(s => s.trim())
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7401549Z                   .filter(Boolean)
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7402172Z                   .map(raw => {
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7402752Z                     const normalized = raw.replace(/^\\?@/, '');
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7404355Z                     if (/\r|\n/.test(normalized)) return null;
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7405249Z                     if (!/^[A-Za-z0-9-]+(?:\/[A-Za-z0-9-]+)?$/.test(normalized)) return null;
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7406081Z                     return `@${normalized}`;
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7406722Z                   })
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7407154Z                   .filter(Boolean);
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7407525Z 
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7407729Z                 if (mentions.length === 0) {
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7408499Z                   await failSafe('No valid owners after parsing owners field');
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7410009Z                   return;
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7410452Z                 }
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7410790Z 
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7410985Z                 const body = item.message
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7411648Z                   ? `${item.message}\n\n//cc: ${mentions.join(' ')}`
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7412329Z                   : mentions.join(' ');
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7412705Z 
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7412874Z                 try {
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7413907Z                   await github.rest.issues.createComment({
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7415065Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7416062Z                     body
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7416503Z                   });
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7417343Z                   core.info(`Posted routing comment on #${issueNumber} mentioning: ${mentions.join(', ')}`);
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7418439Z                 } catch (apiError) {
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7419243Z                   await failSafe(`GitHub API error posting comment: ${apiError.message}`);
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7420074Z                   return;
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7421240Z                 }
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7421682Z               }
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7421921Z 
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7422083Z tools:
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7422440Z   web-fetch:
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7422824Z   github:
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7423416Z     toolsets: [issues]
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7424040Z     # Triage must read issues from all users, including external
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7425142Z     # customers with NONE author_association; without this, the
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7426465Z     # auto-applied "approved" policy filters them out via DIFC
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7427778Z     min-integrity: none
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7428069Z 
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7428243Z timeout-minutes: 10
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7428992Z [hash-debug] No template expressions (env./vars.) found in markdown body
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7429817Z [hash-debug] Canonical JSON (6762 chars):
2026-04-14T03:53:58.7480394Z {"frontmatter-text":"description: |\n  Intelligent issue triage assistant that processes new issues\n  Analyzes issue content, evaluates whether the author is a customer,\n  predicts labels, looks up owners from CODEOWNERS, and provides\n  analysis notes including debugging strategies and resource links\n  Implements the initial issue triage rules for the Azure SDK repository\n\non:\n  issues:\n    types: [opened]\n  workflow_dispatch:\n    inputs:\n      issue_number:\n        description: \"Issue number to triage (used when dispatched from another workflow)\"\n        required: true\n        type: string\n  roles: all\n  reaction: eyes\n\npermissions: read-all\n\nnetwork:\n  allowed:\n    - defaults\n    - \"api.nuget.org\"\n\nsafe-outputs:\n  report-failure-as-issue: false\n  add-labels:\n    max: 7\n    target: \"*\"\n  remove-labels:\n    max: 7\n    target: \"*\"\n  add-comment:\n    max: 2\n    target: \"*\"\n  assign-to-user:\n    max: 1\n    target: \"*\"\n  close-issue:\n    max: 1\n    target: \"*\"\n  noop:\n    report-as-issue: false\n  jobs:\n    mention_owners:\n      description: \"Post a routing comment @mentioning team owners on the triggering issue; bypasses safe-outputs mention neutralization\"\n      runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n      output: \"Owner mention comment posted\"\n      permissions:\n        issues: write\n      inputs:\n        message:\n          description: \"The comment body text without any @mentions or @ symbols\"\n          required: true\n          type: string\n        owners:\n          description: \"Comma-separated GitHub usernames to notify, without the @ prefix (e.g. 'user1, user2, Azure/team-name')\"\n          required: true\n          type: string\n      steps:\n        - name: Post mention comment\n          uses: actions/github-script@v9\n          env:\n            DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER: \"${{ github.event.inputs.issue_number || '' }}\"\n          with:\n            script: |\n              const fs = require('fs');\n              const outputFile = process.env.GH_AW_AGENT_OUTPUT;\n\n              function resolveIssueNumber() {\n                if (Number.isInteger(context.issue?.number) && context.issue.number > 0) {\n                  return context.issue.number;\n                }\n                const parsed = parseInt(process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER, 10);\n                if (Number.isInteger(parsed) && parsed > 0) {\n                  return parsed;\n                }\n                return null;\n              }\n\n              const issueNumber = resolveIssueNumber();\n              const owner = context.repo.owner;\n              const repo = context.repo.repo;\n\n              if (issueNumber === null) {\n                core.setFailed(`Unable to determine a valid issue number. context.issue.number=${context.issue?.number ?? 'undefined'}, DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER=${process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER ?? 'undefined'}`);\n                return;\n              }\n\n              async function failSafe(reason) {\n                core.error(`mention_owners failed: ${reason}`);\n                try {\n                  await github.rest.issues.addLabels({\n                    owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,\n                    labels: ['needs-team-triage']\n                  });\n                  await github.rest.issues.createComment({\n                    owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,\n                    body: '⚠️ Automated triage was unable to complete owner notification for this issue. Routing for manual triage'\n                  });\n                } catch (recoveryError) {\n                  core.error(`Recovery also failed: ${recoveryError.message}`);\n                }\n                core.setFailed(reason);\n              }\n\n              if (!outputFile) {\n                await failSafe('No agent output path provided');\n                return;\n              }\n              if (!fs.existsSync(outputFile)) {\n                await failSafe(`Agent output file not found: ${outputFile}`);\n                return;\n              }\n\n              let agentOutput;\n              try {\n                agentOutput = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(outputFile, 'utf8'));\n              } catch (parseError) {\n                await failSafe(`Failed to parse agent output: ${parseError.message}`);\n                return;\n              }\n\n              if (!agentOutput || !Array.isArray(agentOutput.items)) {\n                await failSafe('Agent output missing items array');\n                return;\n              }\n\n              const items = agentOutput.items.filter(i => i.type === 'mention_owners');\n              if (items.length === 0) {\n                await failSafe('No mention_owners items in agent output');\n                return;\n              }\n\n              for (const item of items) {\n                if (!item.owners || typeof item.owners !== 'string' || !item.owners.trim()) {\n                  await failSafe('mention_owners item missing owners field');\n                  return;\n                }\n\n                const mentions = item.owners\n                  .split(/[\\s,]+/)\n                  .map(s => s.trim())\n                  .filter(Boolean)\n                  .map(raw => {\n                    const normalized = raw.replace(/^\\\\?@/, '');\n                    if (/\\r|\\n/.test(normalized)) return null;\n                    if (!/^[A-Za-z0-9-]+(?:\\/[A-Za-z0-9-]+)?$/.test(normalized)) return null;\n                    return `@${normalized}`;\n                  })\n                  .filter(Boolean);\n\n                if (mentions.length === 0) {\n                  await failSafe('No valid owners after parsing owners field');\n                  return;\n                }\n\n                const body = item.message\n                  ? `${item.message}\\n\\n//cc: ${mentions.join(' ')}`\n                  : mentions.join(' ');\n\n                try {\n                  await github.rest.issues.createComment({\n                    owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,\n                    body\n                  });\n                  core.info(`Posted routing comment on #${issueNumber} mentioning: ${mentions.join(', ')}`);\n                } catch (apiError) {\n                  await failSafe(`GitHub API error posting comment: ${apiError.message}`);\n                  return;\n                }\n              }\n\ntools:\n  web-fetch:\n  github:\n    toolsets: [issues]\n    # Triage must read issues from all users, including external\n    # customers with NONE author_association; without this, the\n    # auto-applied \"approved\" policy filters them out via DIFC\n    min-integrity: none\n\ntimeout-minutes: 10"}
